sections.label: THINKING
sections.content: Let me check what changed after clicking on the red block at (35, 14), row 35 should have shifted. Let me check the current state to see what changed.

sections.label: TOOL CALL: python
sections.content:
<tool_call>
<function=python>
<parameter=code>
seg = current_frame.segmentation
nodes = seg['nodes']
# Focus on row 35 to see if it shifted
row35_colors = []
for i, n in enumerate(nodes):
    if n['pixels'] <= 40 and n['color'] not in ['G', 'c', 'B']:
        b = n['boundary']
        rows = [p[0] for p in b]
        cols = [p[1] for p in b]
        cr = (min(rows)+max(rows))//2
        cc = (min(cols)+max(cols))//2
        if cr == 35:
            row35_colors.append((cc, n['color']))
row35_colors.sort()
print("Row 35 colors:", [(cc, c) for cc, c in row35_colors])
</parameter>
</function>
</tool_call>
